data.content: Planning complete. Implementation should instantiate the real execution_plan knot only after the Knots type and payload slices are available, then build the Slice 1/2 work hierarchy around it and reparent the existing Slice 3 knots underneath the reviewed grouping parents. The key guardrail is to use `planned_by` only for plan provenance and keep `parent_of` limited to the work-knot hierarchy.
